constraints.name: access_code_code
constraints.label: TmagAccessCode
constraints.cypher: CREATE CONSTRAINT access_code_code IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:TmagAccessCode) REQUIRE n.code IS UNIQUE

constraints.name: candidate_status
constraints.label: TmagLearningCandidate
constraints.cypher: CREATE INDEX candidate_status IF NOT EXISTS FOR (c:TmagLearningCandidate) ON (c.status)

constraints.name: content_video_id
constraints.label: TmagContentVideo
constraints.cypher: CREATE CONSTRAINT content_video_id IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:TmagContentVideo) REQUIRE n.contentVideoId IS UNIQUE

constraints.name: crm_record_id
constraints.label: TmagProspectCrmRecord
constraints.cypher: CREATE CONSTRAINT crm_record_id IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:TmagProspectCrmRecord) REQUIRE n.crmRecordId IS UNIQUE

constraints.name: invite_token_token
constraints.label: TmagInviteToken
constraints.cypher: CREATE CONSTRAINT invite_token_token IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:TmagInviteToken) REQUIRE n.token IS UNIQUE

constraints.name: knowledge_id
constraints.label: TmagKnowledge
constraints.cypher: CREATE CONSTRAINT knowledge_id IF NOT EXISTS FOR (k:TmagKnowledge) REQUIRE k.id IS UNIQUE
constraints.purpose: R3 GraphRAG active-knowledge nodes keyed on the shared id.

constraints.name: knowledge_ready
constraints.label: TmagKnowledge
constraints.cypher: CREATE INDEX knowledge_ready IF NOT EXISTS FOR (k:TmagKnowledge) ON (k.retrievalReady)

constraints.name: learning_candidate_id
constraints.label: TmagLearningCandidate
constraints.cypher: CREATE CONSTRAINT learning_candidate_id IF NOT EXISTS FOR (c:TmagLearningCandidate) REQUIRE c.id IS UNIQUE
constraints.purpose: R2 review-only learning candidates keyed on the shared id.

constraints.name: outcome_ba
constraints.label: TmagOutcome
constraints.cypher: CREATE INDEX outcome_ba IF NOT EXISTS FOR (o:TmagOutcome) ON (o.tmagId)

constraints.name: outcome_id
constraints.label: TmagOutcome
constraints.cypher: CREATE CONSTRAINT outcome_id IF NOT EXISTS FOR (o:TmagOutcome) REQUIRE o.id IS UNIQUE
constraints.purpose: R1 outcome nodes keyed on the shared app-memory id (Mongo _id == Chroma id).

constraints.name: pool_id
constraints.label: TmagPool
constraints.cypher: CREATE CONSTRAINT pool_id IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:TmagPool) REQUIRE n.id IS UNIQUE

constraints.name: prospect_prospectId
constraints.label: TmagProspect
constraints.cypher: CREATE CONSTRAINT prospect_prospectId IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:TmagProspect) REQUIRE n.prospectId IS UNIQUE

constraints.name: steve_discovery_id
constraints.label: TmagSteveDiscovery
constraints.cypher: CREATE CONSTRAINT steve_discovery_id IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:TmagSteveDiscovery) REQUIRE n.discoveryId IS UNIQUE

constraints.name: team_magnificent_key
constraints.label: TeamMagnificent
constraints.cypher: CREATE CONSTRAINT team_magnificent_key IF NOT EXISTS FOR (t:TeamMagnificent) REQUIRE t.teamKey IS UNIQUE
constraints.purpose: Single Team Magnificent scope node (:SCOPED_TO target for R2/R3).

constraints.name: team_member_tmagId
constraints.label: TeamMagnificentMember
constraints.cypher: CREATE CONSTRAINT team_member_tmagId IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:TeamMagnificentMember) REQUIRE n.tmagId IS UNIQUE
constraints.purpose: Member identity and sponsor graph anchor.

constraints.name: vm_bulk_lead_id
constraints.label: TmagVmBulkLead
constraints.cypher: CREATE CONSTRAINT vm_bulk_lead_id IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:TmagVmBulkLead) REQUIRE n.leadId IS UNIQUE

constraints.name: vm_campaign_id
constraints.label: TmagVmCampaign
constraints.cypher: CREATE CONSTRAINT vm_campaign_id IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:TmagVmCampaign) REQUIRE n.vmCampaignId IS UNIQUE

constraints.name: vm_lead_owner_id
constraints.label: TmagVmLeadOwner
constraints.cypher: CREATE CONSTRAINT vm_lead_owner_id IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:TmagVmLeadOwner) REQUIRE n.leadOwnerId IS UNIQUE
